Pathway_Genes: SlCHS1 (Solyc05g053550) - Chalcone synthase 1, catalyzes the first committed step in flavonoid biosynthesis; experimentally characterized in tomato
SlCHS2 (Solyc09g091510) - Chalcone synthase 2, catalyzes chalcone formation in flavonoid biosynthesis; experimentally characterized
SlCHI (Solyc05g010320) - Chalcone isomerase, converts naringenin chalcone to naringenin in flavonoid pathway; annotated by sequence similarity
SlCHI (Solyc05g010310) - Chalcone isomerase, second copy involved in flavonoid biosynthesis
SlCHIL (Solyc05g052240) - Chalcone synthase-like, involved in flavonoid biosynthesis
SlF3H (Solyc02g083860) - Flavanone 3-hydroxylase, hydroxylates naringenin to dihydrokaempferol in flavonoid pathway; annotated by sequence similarity
SlF3'H (Solyc03g115220) - Flavonoid 3'-hydroxylase, hydroxylates dihydrokaempferol to dihydroquercetin; expression validated by RNA-seq across species
SlF3'5'H (Solyc11g066580) - Flavonoid 3'5'-hydroxylase, produces dihydromyricetin; experimentally characterized in tomato
SlFLS1 (Solyc11g013110) - Flavonol synthase, converts dihydroflavonols to flavonols; annotated in flavonoid pathway
SlCDRB (Solyc10g078740) - p-Coumaroyl-CoA reductase, involved in dihydrochalcone biosynthesis; annotated as tomato ortholog of apple MdCDRB

SlP3'5'CGT (Solyc02g088500) - Phloretin-3',5'-C-glucosyltransferase, catalyzes C-glycosylation of phloretin; annotated by phylogenetic analysis clustering with rice and citrus flavonoid-C-glucosyltransferases
SlOMT1 (Solyc03g080180) - O-Methyltransferase, involved in methylation of flavonoids to produce isorhamnetin derivatives; annotated in pathway

SlFd3GlcT/SlUGT78D1-a (Solyc10g083440) - Flavonoid-3-O-glucosyltransferase, glucosylates flavonol aglycones at position 3; validated by recombinant protein assay, Arabidopsis overexpression, and VIGS silencing in tomato fruit
SlF3G2''ApiT (Solyc10g008860) - Flavonol-3-O-glc-2''-O-apiosyltransferase, adds apiose to flavonol-3-O-glucoside; annotated by phylogenetic analysis and expression pattern in HABR
SlFd3G6''RhaT (Solyc09g059170) - Flavonoid-3-O-glc-6''-O-rhamnosyltransferase, adds rhamnose to flavonol-3-O-glucoside to form rutin; expression validated by RNA-seq showing lower expression in HABR
SlF7GlcT/SlUGT73B-a (Solyc10g079350) - Flavonoid-7-O-glucosyltransferase, glucosylates flavonoids at position 7; validated by VIGS silencing and transient overexpression in tomato fruit
SlFOMT1 (Solyc06g083450) - Flavonol-O-methyltransferase 1, methylates flavonols; previously experimentally characterized
SlFOMT2 (Solyc06g007960) - Flavonol-O-methyltransferase 2, methylates flavonols; previously experimentally characterized
SlFOMT3 (Solyc06g064500) - Flavonol-O-methyltransferase 3, methylates flavonols; previously characterized
SlDFR (Solyc02g085020) - Dihydrokaempferol-4-reductase, reduces dihydroflavonols in anthocyanin biosynthesis; experimentally characterized
SlANS (Solyc08g080040) - Anthocyanidin synthase, oxidizes leucoanthocyanidins to anthocyanidins; annotated in anthocyanin branch
SlAnthOMT (Solyc09g082660) - Anthocyanin-O-methyltransferase, methylates anthocyanins; experimentally characterized
SlA5GlcT (Solyc12g098590) - Anthocyanin-5-O-glucosyltransferase, glucosylates anthocyanins at position 5; annotated in anthocyanin pathway
SlFdAT1 (Solyc12g088170) - Flavonoid-3-O-rutinoside-4''-phenylacyltransferase, acylates flavonoid glycosides with phenylacyl moieties; experimentally characterized
SlCGT (Solyc01g099020) - GDSL lipase-like caffeoyltransferase, involved in chlorogenic acid biosynthesis; experimentally characterized
Title: Exploiting Natural Variation in Tomato to Define Pathway Structure and Metabolic Regulation of Fruit Polyphenolics in the Lycopersicum Complex
